ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather observation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded (Celsius) */,
  "mean_temp" REAL /* Mean temperature recorded (Celsius) */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded (Celsius) */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature (Celsius) */,
  "mean_dew_point" REAL /* Mean dew point temperature (Celsius) */,
  "min_dew_point" REAL /* Minimum dew point temperature (Celsius) */,
  "max_humidity" REAL /* Maximum humidity percentage */,
  "mean_humidity" REAL /* Mean humidity percentage */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity percentage */,
  "max_sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Maximum sea level pressure (hPa) */,
  "mean_sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Mean sea level pressure (hPa) */,
  "min_sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Minimum sea level pressure (hPa) */,
  "max_visibility" REAL /* Maximum visibility (Km) */,
  "mean_visibility" REAL /* Mean visibility (Km) */,
  "min_visibility" REAL /* Minimum visibility (Km) */,
  "max_wind_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed (Km/h) */,
  "mean_wind_speed" REAL /* Mean wind speed (Km/h) */,
  "max_gust_speed" REAL /* Maximum gust speed (Km/h) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation (mm) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "events" TEXT /* Weather events (e.g., Rain, Thunderstorm) */,
  "wind_dir" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the observation station */,
  "time_of_observation" TEXT /* Time of the observation */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the observation data */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the observation */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the observation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the observation was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the observation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the observation station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station above sea level (meters) */,
  "timeZone" TEXT /* Time zone of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the station */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event (e.g., minor, significant, catastrophic) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_levels" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation */,
  "max_humidity" REAL /* Maximum humidity recorded */,
  "mean_humidity" REAL /* Mean humidity recorded */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_levels_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_records" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "mean_temp" REAL /* Mean temperature recorded */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_records_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_data" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind data record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation */,
  "max_wind_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed recorded */,
  "mean_wind_speed" REAL /* Mean wind speed recorded */,
  "max_gust_speed" REAL /* Maximum gust speed recorded */,
  "wind_dir" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_data_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_levels" (
  "pressure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation */,
  "max_pressure" REAL /* Maximum sea level pressure recorded */,
  "mean_pressure" REAL /* Mean sea level pressure recorded */,
  "min_pressure" REAL /* Minimum sea level pressure recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pressure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_levels_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visibility_data" (
  "visibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visibility record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation */,
  "max_visibility" REAL /* Maximum visibility recorded */,
  "mean_visibility" REAL /* Mean visibility recorded */,
  "min_visibility" REAL /* Minimum visibility recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visibility_data_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_data" (
  "precipitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation record */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation recorded */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precipitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "event_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event log */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event log was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("observation_id")
)
